scenarios.title: Reinforcement Learning Experiments
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task asks for Tianshou, PyTorch/Gymnasium RL, high-level experiment builders, procedural training loops, or algorithm setup.
scenarios.role: Provides repo-specific routing and version-aware guidance for building Tianshou 2.0.1 RL experiments safely.
scenarios.read_when: tianshou, Tianshou, ExperimentBuilder, DQNExperimentBuilder, PPOExperimentBuilder, Algorithm, Policy, OffPolicyTrainerParams, OnPolicyTrainerParams, Gymnasium RL training
scenarios.best_for: High-level builder skeletons, manual DQN/PPO/SAC wiring, bounded CartPole smokes, policy/network/trainer integration, API-v2 migration from older Tianshou examples.
scenarios.avoid_when: The user wants a different RL framework, a generic RL explanation without Tianshou APIs, or benchmark-scale training without installed optional environment dependencies.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose highlevel-experiments for declarative builders and procedural-training for manual network/policy/algorithm/trainer wiring. Route buffer, env, offline, and evaluation details to the focused sub-skills.

scenarios.title: RL Data and Environment Integration
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task asks about Tianshou Batch, ReplayBuffer, Collector, vectorized environments, Gymnasium/PettingZoo wrappers, optional environment engines, or action masks.
scenarios.role: Explains Tianshou-specific data carriers, replay buffers, collectors, vector envs, wrappers, and optional backend boundaries.
scenarios.read_when: Batch, ReplayBuffer, VectorReplayBuffer, PrioritizedReplayBuffer, HERReplayBuffer, Collector.collect, AsyncCollector, DummyVectorEnv, SubprocVectorEnv, PettingZooEnv, action mask, EnvPool, MuJoCo, Atari, VizDoom
scenarios.best_for: Debugging data shapes, buffer sampling, collector stop modes, vector-env worker choice, PettingZoo masks, optional backend install/import failures, and safe no-training smoke checks.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is only about choosing an RL algorithm or high-level experiment builder with no custom data or env handling.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose data-collection for Batch/buffer/collector issues and envs-and-vectorization for Gymnasium/PettingZoo/vector-worker/optional-engine issues. Cross-link to procedural-training when collectors feed a trainer.

scenarios.title: Offline, Specialized RL, and Evaluation
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task asks for Tianshou offline RL, imitation learning, model-based RL, curiosity wrappers, multi-agent wrappers, rliable evaluation, or benchmark planning.
scenarios.role: Routes specialized Tianshou workflows to safe dataset, wrapper, multi-agent, launcher, and benchmark guidance without accidental expensive execution.
scenarios.read_when: CQL, BCQ, TD3+BC, DiscreteCQL, DiscreteBCQ, DiscreteCRR, GAIL, PSRL, ICM, MultiAgentOffPolicyAlgorithm, MultiAgentOnPolicyAlgorithm, JoblibExpLauncher, rliable, benchmark
scenarios.best_for: Offline buffer preparation, expert-buffer validation, curiosity/model-based wrappers, PettingZoo multi-agent algorithm boundaries, multi-seed launcher planning, and rliable result aggregation.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task only needs ordinary online DQN/PPO/SAC wiring or environment vectorization; use procedural-training or envs-and-vectorization instead.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose offline-and-specialized-rl for algorithm families and evaluation utilities, then route buffer mechanics to data-collection and PettingZoo/env mechanics to envs-and-vectorization.
